# agentops_workflow (Resource)

A workflow composed of ordered steps and an optional trigger.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "agentops_workflow" "triage" {
  name        = "incident-triage"
  description = "Triage inbound incidents"
  is_enabled  = true

  labels = {
    owner = "sre"
  }

  # steps and trigger are free-form JSON payloads.
  trigger = jsonencode({ type = "manual" })
  steps   = jsonencode([{ id = "step-1", agent_id = "agent_01hxyz" }])
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Human-readable workflow name.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Free-form description.
- `is_enabled` (Boolean) Whether the workflow is active. Defaults to `true`.
- `labels` (Map of String) Arbitrary key/value labels attached to the workflow.
- `steps` (String) Ordered list of workflow steps, encoded as a JSON array (JSON).
- `trigger` (String) Trigger configuration for the workflow, encoded as a JSON object (JSON).

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `id` (String) Workflow identifier.
- `updated_at` (String) Last-update timestamp.
